March 23, 2023, American International Group, Inc. ("AIG") launched an offering targeting the issuance of a minimum of $500 million in senior unsecured bonds, the net proceeds of which will be used for general corporate purposes, including the repurchase of AIG common stock and the retirement of AIG debt.
